chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-244 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.09.2024 Mr. Altaf Sachal R. Awan advocate for applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. Counsel for the applicant does not press instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application the same is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. JUDGE Ali Haider
